tcs.Title: Systems Engineer
tcs.Desc: Worked in Equifax-UK project to design scalable APIs to manage data transactions. Contributed to cloud migration, legacy system decommission and traffic redirection.

babelcast.Title: Founding Full Stack Software Engineer
babelcast.Desc: Worked as a founding engineer for the development of a webapp for a entertainment-gaming startup, enabling users to collaboratively transpose their voice into thousands of voice models, including celebrities and custom models

eagl.Title: Full Stack Software Engineer
eagl.Desc: Contributing to the development of next-gen IoT gunshot detection system, by building scalable backend on cloud.
